title: stelis pyramidalis
intro: Stelis pyramidalis, also known as the Pyramid Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds that can help to soothe and heal various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis pyramidalis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and providing antioxidant properties that can help to protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Stelis pyramidalis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
